title: Neurobiological Changes Induced by Mindfulness and Meditation: A Systematic Review
headline: Neurobiological Changes Induced by Mindfulness and Meditation: A Systematic Review
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of mindfulness / meditation examined emotional wellbeing.
keyFindings: See the linked paper for detailed results.
limitations: Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
The practice studied (mindfulness / meditation) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
simplifiedTitle: Neurobiological Changes Induced by Mindfulness and Meditation: A Systematic Review
